title: Relationship breakdown and capital gains tax
description: Find out if you can defer, or 'roll over', CGT on assets that transfer to you in a divorce.
keywords: cgt relationship breakdown, capital gains tax marriage breakdown, cgt separation, cgt divorce

child_links.title: When the relationship breakdown rollover applies
child_links.description: Check that you have a court order or formal agreement that qualifies for the relationship breakdown CGT rollover.

child_links.title: Calculating CGT on a rollover asset
child_links.description: Work out your CGT on rollover assets, including assets transferred from other entities.

child_links.title: Main residence exemption in relationship breakdown
child_links.description: If a property was the home of you or your spouse, check if it is exempt from CGT.

source_title: Relationship breakdown and capital gains tax - ATO
